content.full_text:
Board of Supervisors
County of Los Angeles

MICHAEL D. ANTONOVICH
SUPERVISOR FIFTH DISTRICT

September 24, 1991

Mr. Ben Davidian
Executive Director
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" St., Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Davidian:

I would appreciate an interpretation on the ability of purchasing concert season tickets with campaign funds.

In previous years, I have purchased season tickets to the Glendale Symphony and would like to know if I can continue to purchase these tickets for the 1992 season. The amount will be $580.

This is politically important to support local community cultural organizations.

Sincerely,

[Signature]

Michael D. Antonovich
Chairman of the Board
Supervisor, Fifth District

MDA:lk
